label: Alignment of Superhuman AI Systems
description: How do we ensure that AI systems that surpass human-level capability in a domain remain aligned with human values and intent, including in situations their designers did not anticipate?

label: Reliable Multi-Step Reasoning in LLMs
description: Language models still fail in systematic ways on multi-step mathematical and logical reasoning. What architectural or training changes would produce reliably correct reasoning?

label: Safe Agentic AI in Open Environments
description: How do we build AI agents that act safely and reversibly in open-ended environments where mistakes have real-world consequences?

label: Sub-$100/kg to LEO Launch Cost
description: What combination of reusability architecture, materials, and manufacturing innovation would reduce launch cost to LEO below $100/kg at scale?

label: In-Situ Resource Utilization (ISRU) at Scale
description: What processing and manufacturing systems would allow a human settlement on the Moon or Mars to produce propellant, structural materials, and life support consumables from local resources?

label: Primary Causal Mechanism of Aging
description: Is aging driven primarily by information loss in epigenetics (Sinclair), accumulation of senescent cells, mitochondrial dysfunction, or another mechanism? What intervention best addresses the root cause?

label: The Hard Problem of Consciousness
description: Why does subjective experience (qualia) exist at all? How does physical neural activity give rise to the felt quality of experience?

label: Distribution Cold-Start Problem
description: How does a new creator or product get its first 1000 genuine, engaged users in a world of algorithmic gatekeeping and attention scarcity?
